name: get_family_parameters_and_values
desc: Get ALL parameter names and values from selected elements or by ID. Returns every instance and type parameter with current value, storage type, and whether writable. For titleblocks, includes sheet parameters like Checked By and Designed By. Call this before set_parameter_values to see what is available.

parameters.name: elementIds
parameters.description: Optional JSON array of element IDs e.g. [12345,67890]. Defaults to current selection.
